name: Hearty Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large airtight container.
2. Stir to evenly distribute the ingredients.
3. Label as Hearty Soup Mix.
4. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 6 months.
5. Shake well before using.
Makes about 12 1/2 cups of mix.
Hearty Soup Stock:
1. Put 6 cups of water and 1 1/3 cups of the mix in a large kettle or Dutch oven.
2. Add 1 1/2 tablespoons salt.
3. Bring to a boil, then cover and simmer for 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
4. Add 2 carrots (sliced), 1 or 2 stalks celery (chopped), 1 1/2 cups cabbage (shredded), 2 cans tomato sauce (15 oz each), and 1 can vegetable juice cocktail (24 oz).
5. If desired, add 1 lb lean cooked ground beef or leftover cooked beef.
6. Simmer for an additional 20 minutes until the vegetables are cooked.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
